$schema_note: Phase 0 — everything required to exist before any Phase 1 module can be built: monorepo, shared package, database bootstrap, CI scaffolding, and base infrastructure.

phase.name: Project Foundations & Environment
phase.objective: Stand up a working, empty, fully-tooled monorepo that every Phase 1 module can build against — no feature logic yet.

work_packages.name: Monorepo & Tooling Setup
work_packages.goal: pnpm workspace with apps/web, apps/api, packages/shared, shared lint/format/type config, and dev docs.

tasks.title: Initialize pnpm workspace
tasks.description: Create apps/web, apps/api, packages/shared per pnpm-workspace.yaml; root package.json with shared scripts (dev, build, lint, test, typecheck).
acceptance_criteria: pnpm install succeeds from repo root
pnpm -r run <script> fans out to all three packages

tasks.title: Configure TypeScript 5 strict-mode project references
tasks.description: tsconfig.base.json (strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, isolatedModules) + per-package tsconfig extending it; project references so packages/shared types flow into web and api.
acceptance_criteria: tsc -b succeeds with zero errors on an empty scaffold
no 'any' allowed by default

tasks.title: Set up ESLint + Prettier shared config
tasks.description: typescript-eslint, react-hooks, jsx-a11y for web; typescript-eslint + security-focused rules for api; Prettier shared across the workspace.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm -r lint passes on the empty scaffold
CI-ready (see P0.CI.DEVOPS01)

tasks.title: Git hooks & commit conventions
tasks.description: Pre-commit lint-staged + optional commitlint, per team's branching/commit answers in SystemDefinition5.txt §6.
acceptance_criteria: Bad commit message or lint failure blocks commit locally, matching the team's chosen convention
tasks.notes: Optional — depends on team-size answer; skip for solo dev if it adds friction without benefit.

tasks.title: Scaffold packages/shared
tasks.description: zod schema + TypeScript type package consumed by both apps/web and apps/api — the single source of truth for validation shapes referenced throughout definition_data/backend and definition_data/frontend.
deliverables: packages/shared/src/schemas/ (empty module folders matching module-registry.json keys)
acceptance_criteria: apps/api and apps/web can both `import { X } from '@lcc/shared'`
a change to a shared schema type-errors both consumers

tasks.title: Author .env.example
tasks.description: Every configuration key from deployment-definition.json#configuration.keys, documented with purpose and example (non-secret) value.
acceptance_criteria: Every key consumed by apps/api/src/config (zod env parser) has a corresponding documented entry
No real secrets committed

tasks.title: Dev setup / CONTRIBUTING doc
tasks.description: How to clone, install, run docker compose, run migrations+seed, start dev servers, run tests.
acceptance_criteria: A new contributor can go from git clone to a running local stack using only this document

work_packages.name: Database & Prisma Bootstrap
work_packages.goal: Local Postgres 16 reachable via docker compose, empty Prisma schema following the repo's conventions, seed script skeleton, and a mock OSAS server so no dev ever needs real OSAS credentials.

tasks.title: docker-compose for local Postgres 16
tasks.description: postgres:16-alpine service with named volume, exposed only to localhost for dev convenience.
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up postgres works per deployment-definition.json#environments.development.setup

tasks.title: Initialize schema.prisma with base conventions
tasks.description: Set generator/datasource, establish naming conventions used by every table: uuid v7 PK, snake_case, timestamptz created_at/updated_at, deleted_at where soft-deletable.
deliverables: apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma (datasource/generator + conventions comment header, no tables yet)
acceptance_criteria: prisma validate passes
prisma migrate dev creates an empty baseline migration

tasks.title: Seed script skeleton
tasks.description: prisma/seed.ts entrypoint wired into package.json prisma.seed; per-module seed functions added incrementally as each module's tables land.
acceptance_criteria: prisma db seed runs without error against the empty schema

tasks.title: Mock OSAS fixture server
tasks.description: Local/test HTTP server implementing the OSAS API contract (SSO verify, profile fetch, schedule/calendar sync) with personas: active student, alumni, inactive, timeout, malformed-response.
acceptance_criteria: Dev/test environments never call the real university OSAS API
All 5 documented personas are selectable by fixture
tasks.risk: Real OSAS API contract is not yet confirmed (see SystemDefinition5.txt §9) — mock is a best-effort guess from system-overview.json#external_dependencies.osas_api until the real contract is available.

work_packages.name: CI/CD Scaffolding
work_packages.goal: GitHub Actions PR and main pipelines exist and are green on the empty scaffold, so every subsequent PR is protected by the same gates from day one.

tasks.title: PR pipeline workflow
tasks.description: pnpm install (cached) → eslint+prettier check → tsc typecheck (web/api/shared) → vitest unit+integration (Postgres service container) → npm audit --audit-level=high → vite build + api build.
acceptance_criteria: Workflow runs on every PR and is required by branch protection
All 6 steps pass on the empty scaffold

tasks.title: Main pipeline workflow
tasks.description: All PR checks + Playwright E2E against ephemeral stack + build/tag/push Docker images (api, nginx+spa) + deploy step (ssh → compose pull → prisma migrate deploy → compose up -d → smoke /healthz) + rollback note.
acceptance_criteria: Merges to main trigger the full pipeline
A failed deploy step does not leave the pipeline silently green
tasks.notes: Deploy target (VPS vs PaaS) must be decided first — see SystemDefinition5.txt §8.

tasks.title: Branch protection & required checks
tasks.description: Protect main: require PR pipeline green, require review count per SystemDefinition5.txt §6, disallow force-push.
deliverables: GitHub branch protection ruleset on main
acceptance_criteria: Direct pushes to main are blocked
PR cannot merge with a red PR pipeline

tasks.title: CI secrets management
tasks.description: Store deploy SSH key, Docker registry creds, and any CI-time env values as GitHub Actions encrypted secrets; document rotation.
deliverables: GitHub Actions repository/environment secrets configured (not committed anywhere)
acceptance_criteria: No secret value appears in workflow YAML or logs
Rotation procedure documented in maintenance runbook

work_packages.name: Base Infrastructure
work_packages.goal: Deployable container topology (nginx + api + postgres [+redis]) exists and can be brought up on a fresh host — content-free but production-shaped.

tasks.title: Author Dockerfiles
tasks.description: apps/api → node:20-alpine multi-stage build; apps/web → vite build served by nginx image alongside the reverse-proxy config.
acceptance_criteria: Both images build successfully in CI
api image runs with restart: unless-stopped + healthcheck

tasks.title: Production docker-compose topology
tasks.description: nginx, api, postgres, optional redis on an internal Docker network; only nginx exposes 80/443.
acceptance_criteria: DB and API are unreachable from outside the host
Stack starts clean on a fresh VPS with only .env populated

tasks.title: nginx reverse proxy config
tasks.description: Serve built SPA static assets; proxy /api/v1 and /live (WebSocket upgrade headers) to the api service.
acceptance_criteria: Socket.IO upgrade succeeds through the proxy
SPA deep-links (client-side routes) return index.html, not 404

tasks.title: TLS via Let's Encrypt/certbot
tasks.description: HTTP→HTTPS redirect, HSTS, auto-renew; alert 14 days before expiry.
deliverables: certbot automation (cron or container) + nginx TLS server blocks
acceptance_criteria: portal.<institution-domain> serves valid HTTPS
Renewal is unattended
tasks.notes: Requires the domain to actually be registered/pointed — see SystemDefinition5.txt §8.

tasks.title: Provision hosting target + domain/DNS
tasks.description: Stand up the actual VPS (or PaaS equivalent) and point the chosen domain at it.
deliverables: DNS A/AAAA record for portal subdomain
acceptance_criteria: Host meets the 2 vCPU / 4GB RAM baseline (or documented alternative)
tasks.notes: Blocked on SystemDefinition5.txt §8 answers (provider, budget, domain owner).
